Our Story

Why San Francisco Chooses Action Auto Care

We are a trusted auto repair shop proudly serving the San Francisco community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 163 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.

★★★★★

"Robert & team are so kind, and their work is super affordable. They don't try to upsell and are incredibly thorough. Robert even helped me think through whether a repair made sense for my ancient car (and recommended no!). Can't recommend this shop enough!"

— Caroline Wolber  ·  3 months ago
